description_long: This vase features a tall, conical body that gently tapers upward to a broad, flat rim, giving it a robust and substantial appearance. The surface is a deep reddish-brown, with subtle variations in tone and a matte, slightly rough finish that suggests it is made from unglazed ceramic or terracotta. The rim is thick and squared, with a slight overhang, and one side of the vase has a distinct notch or opening just below the rim, possibly for decorative or functional purposes. The body is seamless and unadorned, emphasizing the natural texture and color of the material. There are no visible handles or additional embellishments, lending the vase a minimalist, utilitarian aesthetic. Its sturdy form and earthy color make it well-suited for outdoor urban environments such as parks or plazas.
description: A tall, conical reddish-brown vase with a broad, flat rim and a single notch below the rim, featuring a matte, slightly rough surface and a minimalist design.
description_view_0: Front view shows the vase's broad, flat rim and smooth, unadorned conical body.
description_view_1: This side view highlights the distinct notch or opening just below the rim, adding visual interest.
description_view_2: Rear view mirrors the front, with the same broad rim and seamless, plain surface.
description_view_3: Angled view emphasizes the notch below the rim and the vase's gently tapering form.
